acl_name.description: The name of the Access Control List (ACL) associated with the MemoryDB cluster.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the MemoryDB cluster.

auto_minor_version_upgrade.description: Indicates whether minor engine upgrades are applied automatically to the MemoryDB cluster during the maintenance window.

cluster_endpoint.description: The connection endpoints for the MemoryDB cluster, including address and port.

data_tiering.description: Indicates if data tiering is enabled for the MemoryDB cluster, which allows moving less frequently accessed data to a cost-effective storage layer.

description.description: A user-defined description of the MemoryDB cluster.

engine_patch_version.description: The patch version of the MemoryDB engine used by the cluster.

engine_version.description: The version of the MemoryDB engine used by the cluster.

final_snapshot_name.description: The name of the final snapshot that will be created when the MemoryDB cluster is deleted.

id.description: The unique identifier of the MemoryDB cluster.

kms_key_arn.description: The ARN of the KMS key used to encrypt the data in the MemoryDB cluster.

maintenance_window.description: The time window during which maintenance updates to the MemoryDB cluster are performed.

node_type.description: The type of node used in the MemoryDB cluster, which determines the computing power and memory capacity.

num_replicas_per_shard.description: The number of replica nodes per shard in the MemoryDB cluster.

num_shards.description: The number of shards in the MemoryDB cluster, which helps distribute data across multiple nodes.

parameter_group_name.description: The name of the parameter group associated with the MemoryDB cluster, which defines configuration settings.

port.description: The port number on which the MemoryDB cluster accepts connections.

security_group_ids.description: The IDs of the security groups associated with the MemoryDB cluster, which control inbound and outbound traffic.

shards.description: Details about the shards within the MemoryDB cluster, including names, nodes, and their configurations.

snapshot_retention_limit.description: The number of days for which automatic snapshots are retained before being deleted.

snapshot_window.description: The daily time range during which automatic snapshots are created for the MemoryDB cluster.

sns_topic_arn.description: The ARN of the SNS topic used for publishing notifications related to the MemoryDB cluster.

subnet_group_name.description: The name of the subnet group associated with the MemoryDB cluster, defining the VPC subnets.

tags.description: The tags assigned to the MemoryDB cluster for organization and identification purposes.

tls_enabled.description: Indicates whether Transport Layer Security (TLS) is enabled for connections to the MemoryDB cluster.
